title: Agent identity: A new access model for Claude Tag
summary: Claude Tag introduces an agent identity model that allows Claude to operate autonomously in Slack channels under its own scoped identity rather than impersonating users. The system is designed for safety in multiplayer sessions, with admin governance and full auditability across different workspaces.
writeup: The video introduces Claude Tag, an agent identity model that gives Claude its own scoped identity for operating in Slack channels rather than impersonating individual users. This matters for multiplayer sessions, where distinguishing the agent's actions from human actions is necessary for safety and accountability. Key takeaways: Claude can act autonomously under a dedicated identity, admins govern access, and activity is fully auditable across different workspaces.
